/usr/bin/c++  -stdlib=libc++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o /Users/fyfaris/ns-3-dev/build/lib/libns3-dev-flow-monitor-default.dylib -install_name @rpath/libns3-dev-flow-monitor-default.dylib "CMakeFiles/flow-monitor.dir/helper/flow-monitor-helper.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/flow-monitor.dir/model/flow-classifier.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/flow-monitor.dir/model/flow-monitor.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/flow-monitor.dir/model/flow-probe.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/flow-monitor.dir/model/ipv4-flow-classifier.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/flow-monitor.dir/model/ipv4-flow-probe.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/flow-monitor.dir/model/ipv6-flow-classifier.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/flow-monitor.dir/model/ipv6-flow-probe.cc.o"   -L/Users/fyfaris/ns-3-dev/build/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/fyfaris/ns-3-dev/build/lib /Users/fyfaris/ns-3-dev/build/lib/libns3-dev-internet-default.dylib /Users/fyfaris/ns-3-dev/build/lib/libns3-dev-bridge-default.dylib /Users/fyfaris/ns-3-dev/build/lib/libns3-dev-traffic-control-default.dylib /Users/fyfaris/ns-3-dev/build/lib/libns3-dev-network-default.dylib /Users/fyfaris/ns-3-dev/build/lib/libns3-dev-stats-default.dylib /Users/fyfaris/ns-3-dev/build/lib/libns3-dev-core-default.dylib /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libsqlite3.tbd
